home.title: Ice Boxes
home.emptyDescription: Click “New ice box” above to create your first backup profile.

create.title: Create ice box
create.description: Creating an ice box also prepares its backup branch and Skill document.
create.name: Ice box name
create.gitDirectDescription: OpenClaw pushes directly, great for frequent automatic sync.
create.uploadTokenDescription: No Git setup required. Package and upload on demand.
create.uploadEncryptionDescription: Only applies to “Archive upload”. Encryption happens locally before upload.
create.hintPlaceholder: Example: the long passphrase for the old MacBook
create.saveNote: This creates the matching branch: `{branch}` and syncs the ice box config.

errors.minKeyLength: Master key must be at least 12 characters. A long passphrase is recommended.
errors.keyMismatch: The two master keys do not match.
errors.needGitConfig: Configure the Git repository before creating an ice box.
errors.fillName: Start with the ice box name and we'll help generate the machine-id.
errors.invalidMachineId: machine-id must keep at least one letter, number, or hyphen.

detail.loadFailed: Failed to load ice box details
detail.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the ice box. Please try again later.
detail.restoreNeedGit: Save and test the Git repository on the home page first so restore knows where to fetch backups.
detail.restoreNeedTarget: Set the restore target directory first. Actual data will be restored into its `.openclaw` folder.
detail.restoreNeedConfirm: You need to confirm restore before it can run.
detail.restoreNeedOverwrite: An existing `.openclaw` folder was found. Confirm overwrite after backup before restoring.
detail.deletedDescription: Taking you back to the list. Freezer cleaned up nicely.
detail.notFoundDescription: This device may not have synced local storage yet, or the ice box has not been created.
detail.localOnlyTitle: This ice box currently only exists locally and is not confirmed on the remote yet.
detail.reminderSaved: Reminder settings saved. Next reminder time and status are now refreshed.
detail.reminderReset: Reminder settings reset to the default weekly reminder.
detail.includeGitCredentialPlaceholders: Include Git credential placeholders when installing the Skill
detail.recoveryCommand: One-click restore command for a new machine
detail.historyNeedGit: Save and test the repository connection on the home page first so backup history can be loaded from the remote repository.
detail.cachedHistoryDescription: Background refresh failed this time. You can keep using the cached records for now and try again later.
detail.noHistoryTitle: This ice box has no backup history yet
detail.noHistoryBranchDescription: It will appear here after the first backup. The matching remote backup branch has not been created yet.
detail.noHistoryReadyDescription: The remote branch is in place, but no commit has been found yet. Once the first backup lands in the repository, the history list will appear here.
detail.restorePanelBadgeDescription: Restore the selected `.openclaw` snapshot into a target directory on this machine
detail.restoreDescription: This is not a doc card. It is the real local restore entry point: it reads the selected snapshot from the repository and writes it back into the target directory’s `.openclaw` folder.
detail.restoreStep1Description: Choose the version you want to restore from Backup history.
detail.restoreStep2Description: Confirm the target directory, target commit, and the backup path created before overwrite.
detail.restoreStep3Description: Check the confirmation box before running, so you do not restore the wrong snapshot to the wrong directory.
detail.switchToLatestSnapshot: Switch back to the latest snapshot
detail.restoreSourceLatest: {mode} → latest snapshot on the Git branch
detail.confirmRestoreText: I confirm restoring the `.openclaw` folder from {source} into the target directory above.
detail.latestSnapshotInBranch: the latest snapshot on this branch
detail.overwriteConfirmation: If the target directory already contains `.openclaw`, back up the existing folder first and then overwrite it during restore.
detail.noRestorableSnapshot: There is no restorable snapshot yet
detail.awaitingRestorePath: Will be generated after you fill in the target directory
detail.noRestorableBranches: No restorable `ice-box/...` branches have been found in the current repository yet.
detail.deleteDescription: Deleting it removes it from the local ice box list
detail.confirmDeleteDescription: It disappears from the ice box list on this device immediately after deletion.
detail.removeFromLocalList: Remove this ice box from the local list.

gitConfig.title: Git config
gitConfig.description: Enter the repository info and test it directly. The initialize button only appears after confirming `{branch}` does not exist.
gitConfig.branchExists: Exists. You can go straight to the ice box list.
gitConfig.initializeHint: Connection passed, but `{branch}` is not in the repository yet. Click initialize above to continue.

healthy.label: Healthy
healthy.description: The latest backup completed successfully and things look stable.

syncing.label: Syncing
syncing.description: A backup is running or the latest snapshot is still being written.

attention.label: Needs attention
attention.description: The latest backup had issues. Worth checking soon.

synced.label: Synced to remote
synced.description: This ice box has been verified by reading it back from the remote fridge-config branch.

pending.label: Waiting for remote verification
pending.description: The local record exists, but the remote fridge-config branch has not verified it yet.

failed.label: Remote verification failed
failed.description: The ice box exists locally, but the latest write/read-back check against the remote fridge-config branch failed.

gitBranch.label: Git direct push
gitBranch.description: OpenClaw syncs .openclaw directly to a dedicated branch.

uploadToken.label: Archive upload
uploadToken.description: OpenClaw uploads an archive to the dedicated ice box endpoint, then Claw-Fridge stores it.

daily.description: Good for active machines. Missing once is easy to recover from.

every3Days.description: A balanced cadence for regular work machines.

weekly.description: Good for low-change machines with a calmer default rhythm.

custom.description: Choose your own interval for special workflows.

status.disabledDescription: This ice box will not prompt for backups automatically.
status.waitingBaselineDescription: There is not enough timing data yet to schedule reminders.
status.invalidTimeDescription: The current baseline time is invalid, so the next reminder cannot be calculated yet.
status.waitingFirstBackupDescription: If there is still no first backup in {duration}, a reminder should fire.
status.scheduledDescription: The next reminder window opens in {duration}.
status.dueDescription: The reminder window is open. It became due {duration} ago.
status.overdueDescription: The reminder window passed {duration} ago. A backup is recommended soon.

skillPage.errorHint: Check that the config parameters in the link are complete, then reopen the Skill document from the ice box detail page.
skillPage.unknownError: An unknown error occurred while generating the Skill document. Please try again later.
skillPage.title: {mode} Skill document for {name}
skillPage.description: This page outputs the Markdown you can save directly as `SKILL.md`, along with the install path, Skill link, workflow notes, and whether Git credential placeholders are included.
skillPage.reloadDescription: Keep the filename as `SKILL.md`, then open a new OpenClaw session to confirm the Skill is loaded.
skillPage.markdownDescription: The content below is the final Skill document and can be saved directly as `SKILL.md`. Before sharing, make sure it does not expose a private upload URL, token, or encryption parameters.
